title: United Clan RP Modpack
description: The Modpack made for the Dutch Minecraft server: United Clan RP
body:
_Simple, beautiful, easy... What else can you ask for?_

A Modpack specially made for the Dutch Minecraft server **United Clan RP**

Normal vanilla is always so simple, but everyone still likes it. Why don't we try finding the balance between vanilla and modded? This modpack tries exactly that.

This modpack adds beautiful features like **Iris Shaders**, **Fresh Animation**, **Wakes** to your game while still being very optimized. It also adds QoL features like **Xaero's worldmap**, **Low Shield**, **Low On Fire** and **Zoomify**.

This modpack is also completely ready for our own server server, **United Clan RP**. This modpack adds all the recommended mods for the server including the required **SimpleVoicechat**.

This Modpack is mainly used for playing on **United Clan RP**,  but it’s also very usable outside of the server.

Join the Discord!
To get help with the modpack or joining our server, please join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/sREtjMkSfx)!
